summary: Dim sum ordering app with a Porsian Menu featuring 7 items and a 5-item selection limit. UI refinements in progress.

existing_features.title: Remove the footer tagline text 'Bringing you the finest handcrafted dim sum, made fresh daily with traditional recipes passed down through generations.' from the Footer component.
In the Menu component, change the Porsian selection counter label from '5/5 dipilih' to '5/5 selected' (and update the pattern so any x/5 count reads 'x/5 selected' in English).
Make the 'Place Your Order' section heading font size match the font size currently used by the 'Our Menu' section heading.
Apply the font style (font family, weight, letter spacing, text transform, etc.) and border styling currently used on the 'Place Your Order' section heading to the 'Our Menu' section heading.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove footer text 'Bringing you the finest handcrafted dim sum, made fresh daily with traditional recipes passed down through generations.'
Make 'Place Your Order' font size the same as 'Our Menu'
Make 'Our Menu' font style and border the same as 'Place Your Order'
